# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
  
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
  
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
  
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0c94855196bbcf136
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupName: MyDatabaseSubnetGroup
      SubnetIds: 
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyDatabaseSubnetGroup
  
  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBName: mydb
      Engine: mysql
      InstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      AllocatedStorage: '5'
      MasterUsername: masteruser
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
  
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    
  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Subnets: 
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups: 
        - !GetAtt EC2Instance.GroupId
  
Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref MyVPC
